message:
test(robot_overview): make JSON-shape assertion symmetric with skip_serializing_if

The `unlock_maximizers` field has `#[serde(skip_serializing_if =
"Vec::is_empty")]`, so the JSON key is absent when the Vec is empty.
The previous assertion `json["unlock_maximizers"].is_array()` indexes
into Null in that case and fails (Value::Null.is_array() == false),
so the test happened to pass only because the specific fixture
produces a non-empty Vec.

Make the JSON assertion match the serialization contract: when empty,
assert the key is missing; when non-empty, assert array shape and
length match. Matches the pattern used for `fronts` in the adjacent
`robot_overview_fronts_empty_when_no_label_groups` test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
